basis: C24 closed the declared B1-B4 remediation target: focused runtime-contract recheck passed, full tests.test_cli passed, and UI-facing regression suites passed.

Postflight runtime attestation and account snapshot are healthy enough to preserve the non-blocking quota rule: healthcheck is OK, accounts_total=25, launch_capable_backend_count=11, and quota_exhausted_backend_count=6 is treated as non-blocking by declared contour policy.

Postflight owner surfaces still emit contradictory readiness truth: status reports claim_gate.status=blocked and rollout rotation inspect reports ROTATION_EVIDENCE_CONTRADICTED because policy drift is detected.

C22 integration preflight states that only contradictory machine signals should reopen Gate A closure; that condition is met in C24 postflight, so readiness cannot be upgraded to READY_FOR_GATE_A_INTEGRATION.

blockers.description: status --json postflight reports claim_gate.status=blocked with CLAIM_GATE_BLOCKED and blocked_claims from policy_drift.
rollout rotation inspect --json postflight reports ROTATION_EVIDENCE_CONTRADICTED with evidence_reason=policy_drift_detected.

required: adjudicate or repair claim-gate and rotation contradiction surfaces without relying on quota exhaustion as a blocker
do not execute main-app integration until contradictory readiness surfaces are cleared or explicitly reclassified by canon-backed evidence
